description_long: This is a modern two-story house set on a rectangular lot with a mix of hardscaped driveway and landscaped green areas. The house features a flat roof with multiple levels and sections, some of which appear to have skylights or rooftop amenities. The exterior is primarily light-colored, with large windows and a clean, geometric design. The property is bordered by a wooden fence and includes several stylized trees and shrubs, adding to the suburban feel. The driveway leads up to the front entrance, which is partially obscured by a tree, and the backyard area is more open with additional greenery. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, flat-roofed two-story house with large windows, light exterior, and landscaped yard, bordered by a wooden fence and driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and prominent tree partially obscuring the entryway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, flat roof sections, and multiple trees along the fence line.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard area, additional windows, and a more open green space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the wooden fence, side windows, and a less prominent driveway.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, partially obscured by a tree, and a paved driveway leading up to the door
